FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.30sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f9e3306f1a0>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-11T14:18:04Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-11T14:16:17Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-11T14:18:04Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-11T14:16:17Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/11 14:19:46.053844355 {

2026/05/11 14:19:46.053962883 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/11 14:19:46.053976694 new$encoding <- encoding

2026/05/11 14:19:46.053991926 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/11 14:19:46.054017655 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/11 14:19:46.054018446 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/11 14:19:46.054032407 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/11 14:19:46.054033329 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/05/11 14:19:46.054048642 if (!missing(colormodel))

2026/05/11 14:19:46.054125768 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/11 14:19:46.054152127 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/11 14:19:46.054152958 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/11 14:19:46.054171707 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/11 14:19:46.054172748 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/05/11 14:19:46.054190735 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/11 14:19:46.054207090 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/11 14:19:46.054207861 "default"))
2026/05/11 14:19:46.054224696 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/11 14:19:46.054225417 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/11 14:19:46.054239679 }
2026/05/11 14:19:46.054240450 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/05/11 14:19:46.054256033 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/11 14:19:46.054271046 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/11 14:19:46.054306499 }

2026/05/11 14:19:46.054320630 }

2026/05/11 14:19:46.054351056 domain = NA)
2026/05/11 14:19:46.054366750 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)

2026/05/11 14:19:46.054381632 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
